title: elaphoglossum commutatum
intro: Elaphoglossum commutatum, also known as the "Commute Elaphoglossum," is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum commutatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used to treat various ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
